title: El camino de Babel
writer: Jerónimo Mihura, José Luis Sáenz de Heredia
actors: Alfredo Mayo, Guillermina Grin, Fernando Fernán Gómez
plot: Arturo, César and Marcelino are three medical students. Worried about their future, two of them agree to marry only a wealthy woman, while the third one chooses to marry for love.
